chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Times When Intercourse is Disliked

parts.text: 4410 - وَ سَأَلَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ اَلْفَيْضِ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فَقَالَ

text: أُجَامِعُ وَ أَنَا عُرْيَانٌ قَالَ "لاَ وَ لاَ تَسْتَقْبِلُ اَلْقِبْلَةَ وَ لاَ تَسْتَدْبِرُهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4410 - Muhammad ibn al-Faydh asked Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), saying: "May I engage in intercourse while being completely naked?"
Imam (as) replied: "No, and do not face the Qibla nor turn your back to it."
